results.title: Kia Is Thinking Outside the Box in America
results.description: (TestMiles) - Kia Is Thinking Outside the Box in America with hybrids, SUVs, and family vehicles that match how U.S. shoppers actually live. Kia’s recent success in America is not happening because the company found one magic vehicle. It is happening because Kia seems to understand something many automakers are still wrestling with: American buyers [...]
